description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new smart home account using any North American country, choose a time zone whose label contains the word 'Central', and turn off all optional marketing email preferences during signup.
tasks.name: Create a new smart home account using any North American country, choose a time zone whose label contains the word 'Central', and turn off all optional marketing email preferences during signup.
tasks.description: Create a new smart home account using any North American country, choose a time zone whose label contains the word 'Central', and turn off all optional marketing email preferences during signup.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for a new account and select the cheapest subscription plan that includes both security camera support and remote access with a monthly price of $15 or less.
tasks.name: Sign up for a new account and select the cheapest subscription plan that includes both security camera support and remote access with a monthly price of $15 or less.
tasks.description: Sign up for a new account and select the cheapest subscription plan that includes both security camera support and remote access with a monthly price of $15 or less.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, set up a home with exactly two rooms, and register exactly one thermostat and two smart lights while assigning each device to one of the rooms.
tasks.name: Create a new account, set up a home with exactly two rooms, and register exactly one thermostat and two smart lights while assigning each device to one of the rooms.
tasks.description: Create a new account, set up a home with exactly two rooms, and register exactly one thermostat and two smart lights while assigning each device to one of the rooms.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, then configure notifications so that security alerts are sent only as mobile push notifications, all marketing emails are disabled, and quiet hours are enabled from 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM local time.
tasks.name: Create a new account, then configure notifications so that security alerts are sent only as mobile push notifications, all marketing emails are disabled, and quiet hours are enabled from 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM local time.
tasks.description: Create a new account, then configure notifications so that security alerts are sent only as mobile push notifications, all marketing emails are disabled, and quiet hours are enabled from 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM local time.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, then add exactly three household members with roles Admin, Standard, and Guest, giving all of them access to at least one shared room while limiting settings access to the Admin only.
tasks.name: Create a new account, then add exactly three household members with roles Admin, Standard, and Guest, giving all of them access to at least one shared room while limiting settings access to the Admin only.
tasks.description: Create a new account, then add exactly three household members with roles Admin, Standard, and Guest, giving all of them access to at least one shared room while limiting settings access to the Admin only.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for a new account and adjust privacy settings to allow device diagnostic data and anonymized usage analytics while disabling all third‑party data sharing and personalized ads.
tasks.name: Sign up for a new account and adjust privacy settings to allow device diagnostic data and anonymized usage analytics while disabling all third‑party data sharing and personalized ads.
tasks.description: Sign up for a new account and adjust privacy settings to allow device diagnostic data and anonymized usage analytics while disabling all third‑party data sharing and personalized ads.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, then set a 6‑digit security PIN, require that PIN for all remote door lock and unlock actions, and enable account lockout after 5 failed PIN attempts.
tasks.name: Create a new account, then set a 6‑digit security PIN, require that PIN for all remote door lock and unlock actions, and enable account lockout after 5 failed PIN attempts.
tasks.description: Create a new account, then set a 6‑digit security PIN, require that PIN for all remote door lock and unlock actions, and enable account lockout after 5 failed PIN attempts.

tasks.instruction: After creating a new account, set up a weekday morning automation that turns on all kitchen lights at exactly 7:00 AM from Monday through Friday only.
tasks.name: After creating a new account, set up a weekday morning automation that turns on all kitchen lights at exactly 7:00 AM from Monday through Friday only.
tasks.description: After creating a new account, set up a weekday morning automation that turns on all kitchen lights at exactly 7:00 AM from Monday through Friday only.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account and choose the cheapest annual subscription option whose yearly price, when divided by 12, is less than $10 per month.
tasks.name: Create a new account and choose the cheapest annual subscription option whose yearly price, when divided by 12, is less than $10 per month.
